headline: Tech/staples oversold on AI-capex doubt and oil shock; energy overbought on Iran premium — vol spike not triggered.
Oil-shock premium overbought in energy/metals vs. oversold semis — earnings binaries (TSLA/GOOGL/IBM) tonight override all pre-event setups.
Oversold chips eye a bounce as peace-talk diplomacy threatens to unwind the Iran-war oil spike — two clean reversion theses colliding.
Semis & streaming deeply oversold vs. energy & defense overbought — Iran deal is the pivot that flips both; chip earnings binary overrides all oversold reads this week.
Semiconductor sell-off (TSM capex scare) creates highest-quality oversold setups; crude/defense overbought on Iran risk — vol not yet at fade-worthy spike.
